title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6:00pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-7526 Screenwise (971) 673-0581 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Vietnamese, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: One block north of Main Street. Three blocks east of Highway 99. Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH AND CONNECTION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC
